tasks.subject: Task 1: Add Provider Submodule Type and New Options to Feature Submodule
tasks.description: Extend featureSubmodule in helpers.nix with includes, provides, os, homeLinux, homeDarwin, and collectsProviders options while keeping full backward compatibility.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement Multi-Phase Resolver
tasks.description: Create the new resolver that handles hierarchical includes, excludes cascading, collected providers, and deduplication.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Virtual Class Forwarding in Module Collection
tasks.description: Update module collection utilities to handle os, homeLinux, homeDarwin forwarding from both features and providers.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Smoke Test with Stylix Using Providers and Virtual Classes
tasks.description: Convert stylix to use provides.impermanence and homeLinux, validating the full pipeline end-to-end.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Composition Chain (.wrap/.apply/.eval)
tasks.description: Implement the composition chain factory that attaches .wrap/.apply/.eval to feature evaluation results.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Feature Extraction as Flake Outputs
tasks.description: Expose featureModules and featureSets as flake outputs with composition chains attached.
